description_long: This guard rail consists of four horizontal metal bars supported by two vertical posts at each end, forming a sturdy linear barrier. The bars are evenly spaced and appear to be made of black-coated steel, providing both strength and corrosion resistance. The top bar features a blue label or branding, adding a visual identifier to the otherwise monochrome structure. The ends of the posts are capped and slightly extend above the top rail, while the bottom of the posts includes small protruding feet for mounting. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for urban environments such as roadsides, parking lots, or pedestrian walkways. The construction suggests durability and the ability to withstand moderate impacts, serving as a protective barrier for vehicles and pedestrians.
description: A black-coated steel guard rail with four horizontal bars and two vertical posts, featuring a blue label on the top rail. Designed for urban roadside or pedestrian protection, it is sturdy and minimalistic.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four horizontal bars, two vertical posts, and a blue label on the top rail.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the guard rail, with only the edge of the posts and rails visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the four horizontal bars and two posts, but without the blue label.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the posts' edges.
